pattern_report: 18-24 audiences drive a 89% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 34% lower CVR and 48% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
18-25 audiences drive a 67% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 26% lower CVR and 49% lower CPA across 3 campaigns.
21-28 audiences drive a 60% stronger performance score versus baseline, with 24% lower CVR and 50% lower CPA across 1 campaigns.
Ugc_Video creatives deliver a 89% stronger performance score, 34% lower CVR, and 48% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 1 campaigns.
Video creatives deliver a 67% stronger performance score, 26% lower CVR, and 49% lower CPA while sustaining 3.5% CTR across 3 campaigns.
Image creatives deliver a 11% stronger performance score, 7% lower CVR, and 38% lower CPA while sustaining 2.8% CTR across 2 campaigns.
cmp_005_linkedin_exec_report is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 105.56 on 7600.00 spend while only converting at 9.5%.
cmp_002_google_search_saas_demo is overspending relative to history, with CPA at 67.71 on 6500.00 spend while only converting at 4.2%.
TikTok campaigns average 3.5% CTR and 3.3% CVR, driving a 89% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Meta campaigns average 3.1% CTR and 4.4% CVR, driving a 27% stronger score than the portfolio average.
Google Ads campaigns average 2.6% CTR and 4.2% CVR, driving a 53% weaker score than the portfolio average.
Meta CTR is trending down by 0.00% per campaign over the last 3 runs.
The scale winners cluster contains 2 campaigns with 3.6% average CVR and 23.71 CPA.
The mixed cluster contains 2 campaigns with 4.7% average CVR and 29.00 CPA.
The at risk cluster contains 2 campaigns with 6.8% average CVR and 86.63 CPA.
